pages.pageRole: Proposed final home: advisor hero plus final calculator

nextActions: Inspect desktop and mobile locally before marking DONE.

pages.pageRole: Core funnel page: why upgrade the advice
pages.currentStatus: Live consolidated page.
pages.recommendation: Curate into one final argument: keep your custodian, upgrade the advice, verify the credentials, and understand the fiduciary standard.
nextActions: Choose the strongest hero from current route vs upgrade1/2 story vs v0-cgpt custodian framing.
Keep only the best credential proof and source citations.
Use data visuals sparingly so the page does not become a catalog.

pages.pageRole: Core funnel page: planning tools and better information
pages.currentStatus: Live route with canonical animated header and tool sections.
pages.recommendation: Keep the animated header, then sharpen the page around planning clarity and decision quality rather than a generic software showcase.
nextActions: Review improveToolsPageConfig versions 1-3 for strongest order and copy.
Decide whether RightCapital screenshots need updated crops or explanatory context.
Make the CTA connect naturally to calculator state or scheduling.

pages.pageRole: Core funnel page: fee proof and savings math
pages.currentStatus: Live fee projection chart and savings visualization.
pages.recommendation: Make /save the final proof page. Pull only the best fee simulator, fee wedge, and control-matrix ideas from old variants.
nextActions: Decide whether the current chart is enough or needs the preserved simulator.
Merge the control-matrix idea if it makes the page more decision-oriented.
Avoid repeating every academic quote from old variants.

pages.currentStatus: Live placeholder-style page.
pages.recommendation: Either give this a distinct campaign job or cut/redirect it into /save. The phrase is memorable but may be too casual for the final trust system.
nextActions: Decide whether the route name belongs in the public nav.
If cut, redirect to /save and remove it from final navigation.
If kept, make it a focused campaign page rather than a duplicate proof page.

pages.currentStatus: Live consolidated Task vs Purpose route.
pages.recommendation: Cut this down to one memorable idea. Keep the point that the job is helping people, then remove repetition and anything that feels motivational instead of trustworthy.
nextActions: Choose Engine/Pilot vs strikethrough task-vs-purpose as the primary visual idea.
Keep it connected to firm story and advisor standard.
Make sure it does not compete with Smarter Way Wealth's trust-hub story.

pages.currentStatus: Live technical math and URL parameter page.

pages.currentStatus: Live interactive portfolio architecture demo.

finalists: upgrade10: most polished task-vs-purpose framing
upgrade8: strongest fiduciary education and FAQ structure
upgrade5: best data visualizations
upgrade-your-advice-v0-cgpt: strongest keep-your-custodian message
upgrade3: strongest source/citation base
variantFamilies.duplicatesSummarized: upgrade4 duplicates upgrade3. upgrade1/upgrade2 are useful personal-story foundations but not standalone finalists.
variantFamilies.recommendation: Keep the current route, then curate it into one sharper final page using the custodian message, source rigor, and the most useful visuals.

finalists: save3: most complete interactive fee education
save2: strongest arithmetic diagram and quote-card style
save1: cleanest control-matrix concept
docs/save-snippets: preserved simulator, fee wedge, and control matrix references
variantFamilies.duplicatesSummarized: save1/save2/save3 overlap heavily on fee arithmetic, quotes, and charts.
variantFamilies.recommendation: Build one final /save proof page and either cut or redirect /save-a-ton unless that phrase becomes a campaign-specific page.

finalists: AnimatedHeader.tsx: canonical animated header with brand green
improveToolsPageConfig versions 1-3: recoverable content order and hero copy variants

variantFamilies.duplicatesSummarized: The improve variants mostly share structure and differ in copy/order. The current route already carries the canonical header.
variantFamilies.recommendation: Keep the current route, tighten the first viewport, and make the RightCapital/tool proof feel like a serious planning workflow rather than a software tour.

finalists: meaning1: best Engine vs Pilot visual
upgrade10: most polished strikethrough task-vs-purpose version
upgrade9: useful but less polished task-vs-purpose copy
current /meaning: consolidated live route

variantFamilies.recommendation: Keep one purpose page only. Use the Engine/Pilot idea if it supports trust, and remove anything that sounds like generic motivational copy.
